property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.16.8-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\gf352\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.16.8-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\doxygen\bin;C:\Program Files\Microchip\xc8\v2.36\bin;C:\Program Files\Microchip\xc-dsc\v3.21\bin;C:\Program Files\Microchip\xc16\v2.10\bin;C:\Users\gf352\CreateC#Project;C:\Users\gf352\Maven\bin;C:\Users\gf352\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\gf352\.dotnet\tools;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\JetBrains Rider 2024.1.7\bin;;C:\Users\gf352\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\gf352\Flutter\flutter\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.1.1\bin;c:\Users\gf352\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.
